products.name: LandMark™005 IMU
products.descriptor: Compact six-axis MEMS IMU with VELOX™ high-speed processing

evidence.snippet:
### LandMark™005 IMU
The LandMark™005 IMU is Gladiator Technologies’ high speed, six-axis MEMS Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) equipped with low noise sensors, VELOX™ high speed processing and user configurable firmware.  Only 0.6 cubic inches, the LandMark™005 comes factory calibrated over the full temperature range, conditioned over environments.
All Products are NON-ITAR

products.name: LandMark™007 IMU
products.descriptor: High-dynamic six-axis MEMS IMU with 2000°/s gyroscopes and 98g accelerometers

evidence.snippet:
### LandMark™007 IMU
High speed, six-axis IMU built for high dynamic environments.
This IMU is equipped with low noise sensors and VELOX™ high speed processing and user configurable firmware. Only 0.7 cubic inches, the LandMark™007 comes factory calibrated over the full temperature range and conditioned over environment.
All Products are NON-ITAR

products.descriptor: High-dynamic six-axis MEMS IMU with 2000°/s gyroscopes and 200g accelerometers

evidence.snippet:

High Dynamic 6 Axis IMU

products.name: MRM60 IMU
products.descriptor: High-performance six-axis MEMS IMU with analog output

evidence.snippet:
### MRM60 IMU
_Analog Output_
The MRM60 Analog IMU is a High Performance six-axis MEMS IMU with Analog Output. Equipped with low noise sensors, the MRM60 IMU delivers precision measurement with analog outputs in either ± 2.5 volt or ± 5 volt ranges. This IMU is ideal for precision measurement applications critical in rail, industrial, and automotive industries.
All Products are NON-ITAR

products.name: G300D Triax Gyro
products.descriptor: Compact three-axis MEMS gyroscope with VELOX™ high-speed processing

evidence.snippet:
### G300D Triax Gyro
The G300D is Gladiator Technologies’ high speed, three-axis MEMS gyroscope equipped with low noise sensors, [VELOX™](https://f11.7cd.myftpupload.com/velox/) high speed processing and user configurable firmware. At only .6 cubic inches, the G300D gyro comes factory calibrated over the full temperature range, conditioned over environments and is ideal for precision stabilization and rotation measurement applications.
All Products are NON-ITAR

products.name: G200
products.descriptor: Analog dual-axis MEMS gyroscope with ultra-low noise sensors

evidence.snippet:
### G200
_Analog Dual-Axis Gyro_
The G200 is Gladiator Technologies’ analog dual-axis MEMS gyroscope equipped with ultra low noise sensors. The G200 gyroscope comes factory calibrated over the full temperature range, conditioned over environments and is ideal for precision stabilization and rotation measurement applications.
All Products are NON-ITAR

evidence.snippet:

All Products are NON-ITAR

products.name: GA50
products.descriptor: High-end open-loop MEMS accelerometer series in multiple G ranges

evidence.snippet:
### GA50
The GA50 series high-end open loop MEMS accelerometers are available in various sensing ranges. The accelerometer is based on a bulk micromachined silicon MEMS device and an application specific integrated circuit (ASIC) with an analog front end (AFE) and a temperature sensor, assembled in a custom-tailored, hermetically sealed, and compact LCC20 package.
All Products are NON-ITAR

products.name: A300D
products.descriptor: Ultra-low noise three-axis digital MEMS accelerometer with high dynamic range

evidence.snippet:
### A300D
The new A300D is Gladiator Technologies’ ultra-low noise three-axis digital MEMS accelerometer with high dynamic range sensors. At only 0.6 cubic inches, the A300D accelerometer comes factory calibrated over the full temperature range, conditioned over environments.
All Products are NON-ITAR

products.name: A40 Accelerometer
products.descriptor: Small single-axis MEMS accelerometer rated for 500g shock

evidence.snippet:
### A40 Accelerometer
The A40 Accelerometer is a small, ultra-low noise, single-axis MEMS accel. This robust accel is designed to handle 500g shock and 5.74g RMS vibration in an EMI resistant housing. Its price and performance are ideal for low frequency motion and tilt measurement.
All Products are NON-ITAR

products.name: LandMark™ 005 INS/GPS
products.descriptor: Integrated INS/GPS inertial navigation system based on the LandMark™005 platform

evidence.snippet: Gladiator Technologies will attend ION-GNSS in Portland, OR Sept 25-29. You can schedule a meeting with Mark to discuss the new LandMark™005 IMU, LandMark™ 005 INS/GPS, LandMark™ 60 IMU and G300D Gyro at sales@gladiatortechnolgies.com.
